channel.title: GitHub Vue Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: Lissy93/dashy
item.description: 🚀 A self-hostable personal dashboard built for you. Includes status-checking, widgets, themes, icon packs, a UI editor and tons more!

item.title: luckjiawei/frpc-desktop
item.description: frp跨平台桌面客户端，可视化配置，轻松实现内网穿透！ 支持所有frp版本

item.title: tiny-craft/tiny-rdm
item.description: Tiny RDM (Tiny Redis Desktop Manager) - A modern, colorful, super lightweight Redis GUI client for Mac, Windows, and Linux.

item.title: AutomaApp/automa
item.description: A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

item.title: alireza0/s-ui
item.description: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

item.title: bastienwirtz/homer
item.description: A very simple static homepage for your server.

item.title: un-pany/v3-admin-vite
item.description: ☀️ A crafted admin template「vue admin / vue template / vue3 admin / vue3 template / vue3 后台 / vue3 模板」

item.title: TeamPiped/Piped
item.description: An alternative privacy-friendly YouTube frontend which is efficient by design.

item.title: kailong321200875/vue-element-plus-admin
item.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

item.title: HalseySpicy/Geeker-Admin
item.description: ✨✨✨ Geeker Admin，基于 Vue3.4、TypeScript、Vite5、Pinia、Element-Plus 开源的一套后台管理框架。

item.title: LOG1997/log-lottery
item.description: 🎈🎈🎈🎈年会抽奖程序，threejs+vue3 3D球体动态抽奖应用。

item.title: jd-opensource/nutui
item.description: 京东风格的移动端 Vue 组件库，支持多端小程序(A Vue.js UI Toolkit for Mobile Web)

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player
